summary: Tested bug fixes for iteration 21: Causal Intelligence, Form completion, Equipment deletion impact, Dashboard Quick View, and Observations timeline. All features working correctly.

issues: Translation keys showing instead of text: 'dashboard.submittedBy', 'dashboard.on', 'dashboard.noFormData', 'common.notes', 'dashboard.viewInFormDesigner'

causal_intelligence.notes: API returns probable causes with normalized probability_level (very_likely, likely, possible, unlikely) and confidence levels. Tested with threat 793e2a1c-b40e-414f-b847-663fbfea22a6 - returned 5 causes with proper structure.

equipment_deletion_impact.notes: Delete confirmation dialog shows impact analysis: 50 child nodes, 12 Open Tasks, 5 Active Task Plans. Cancel and Delete buttons work correctly.

dashboard_quick_view.notes: Clicking form submission item opens Quick View modal instead of navigating. Shows form data, status, notes, and buttons to Close or View in Form Designer.

form_completion.notes: Adhoc task execution shows form with fields (Bearing Temperature, Vibration, Seal Condition, Notes, Attachments). Complete button visible.

observations_timeline.notes: threatTimeline query key is invalidated on threat deletion (line 241 in ThreatsPage.js)

ai_probability_normalization.notes: _normalize_probability_level and _normalize_confidence_level methods properly map AI responses to valid enum values

action_items: Fix translation keys in Dashboard Quick View modal - showing raw keys instead of translated text
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working: 1) Causal Intelligence normalizes probability levels correctly, 2) Equipment deletion shows impact dialog with affected items count, 3) Dashboard Quick View opens modal for form submissions, 4) Form completion flow works with adhoc tasks, 5) threatTimeline query key invalidated on deletion. Minor issue: translation keys showing in Quick View modal.
